title: Liability of clerk of court
doc_html:
Art. 259. Liability of clerk of court

            The clerk of court shall not be liable for any damages caused by any third party to any information included in pleadings or documents filed of record by the clerk of court.

            Acts 2017, No. 173, §5.
doc_text:
Art. 259.  Liability of clerk of court
The clerk of court shall not be liable for any damages caused by any third party to any
information included in pleadings or documents filed of record by the clerk of court.
Acts 2017, No. 173, §5.
